name: leptos-rsx-html
description: HTML syntax highlighting and IntelliSense inside Leptos view! macros — brace-safe highlighting with embedded Rust, per-element attribute and value completions.

leptosRsxHtml.filterSemanticTokens.markdownDescription: Filter rust-analyzer's semantic tokens inside `view!` markup (tags, attribute names, quoted values) so the RSX grammar shows through, while embedded and surrounding Rust keeps full semantic highlighting. Takes effect on the next edit after toggling.

leptosRsxHtml.filterHovers.markdownDescription: Trim rust-analyzer's generic crate-documentation section (the `extern crate leptos` / "About Leptos" block) from hovers on `view!` markup, keeping the element signature and its docs. Uses the same rust-analyzer hook as `#leptosRsxHtml.filterSemanticTokens#`.

leptosRsxHtml.decorationsFallback.markdownDescription: Paint RSX markup with editor decorations (extension palette, not theme colors). `auto`: only when semantic-token filtering can't attach to rust-analyzer. `always` / `off` force it on or off.

leptosRsxHtml.hovers.markdownDescription: Which RSX hovers to show. Default `off`: rust-analyzer already stacks its own hover cards inside `view!`, so RSX hovers add noise. `attributes` documents attribute names and Leptos namespaces (MDN-sourced); `all` also adds tag hovers, which duplicate rust-analyzer's tachys element docs.

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run test:grammar && npm run test:smoke
